chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.D- 1663 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case 15-02-2022 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G-Sindh. O R D E R At the very outset, learned Assistant Advocate General has relied upon Judgment of this Court, reported as Umer Din Mehar and others v. P.O. Sindh and others (PLD 2021 Sindh 298) and submits that the issue involved in this matter is covered by the said judgment. We have perused the same and his contention appears to be correct. In the said judgment at para-14, it has been held as under:- “14. In view of the main grievance of the petitioners discussed above, we hold that Irrigation Department shall ensure supply of water to every khatedars per his share prescribed in the share list; and shall take action forthwith according to law against such khatedars who have violated or violate the law by tampering with the sanctioned modules and/or by changing the watercourse and/or by creating obstruction in the water supply of other khatedars”. In view of the above, this Petition stands disposed of on the same terms, as above. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
